case_title: PAULA CRAWLEY VS. GEORGE LEE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRAWLEY, PAULA AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, GEORGE DOES 1-25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-11-2007 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-12-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-26-2007

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-20-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-11-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON APR-10-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AND ENTIRE ACTION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-20-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-10-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE WITH PROOF OF SERVICE
